top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(NumTstTakr) 
FROM satscores s
JOIN schools sc ON s.cds = sc.CDSCode
WHERE sc.City = 'Fresno' 
  AND sc.OpenDate >= '1980-01-01' 
  AND sc.OpenDate <= '1980-12-31';

SELECT AVG(NumTstTakr) 
FROM satscores s
JOIN schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode
WHERE sch.City = 'Fresno' 
  AND sch.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31';

  AND sch.OpenDate >= '1980-01-01'
